agent_runs_terminal_timestamp.name: agent_runs_terminal_timestamp
agent_runs_terminal_timestamp.value: ("agent_runs"."state" IN ('succeeded','partial','failed','canceled','crashed') AND "agent_runs"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("agent_runs"."state" NOT IN ('succeeded','partial','failed','canceled','crashed') AND "agent_runs"."completed_at" IS NULL)
